name: Crepes with Fruit
recipeIngredient: 4 cups seasonal fruits or berries (peach chunks, strawberries, blueberries, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the eggs, milk, melted butter, sugar, and salt until smooth.
2. Let the batter stand for about half an hour to allow the bubbles to escape; stir before using.
3. Lightly oil a crepe pan and heat over medium-high heat.
4. Pour 1/4 cup of batter into the hot pan and immediately tip the pan to coat the entire bottom.
5. Place on the burner and cook until the edges begin to brown and the batter loses its shine.
6. Transfer the crepe to a cooling rack. Repeat until all the batter is used.
7. Stack the crepes if being used immediately; layer with waxed paper if refrigerating or freezing.
8. To serve, fill each crepe with about 1/3 cup of seasonal fruit or berries, roll, and top with 1 tablespoon of raspberry coulis.
Note: These can be served in just a few minutes when you make the crepes ahead of time and freeze them.
